def negative_package_root_reexports_large_dependency_tree_by_default():
    rule_id = "package_root_reexports_large_dependency_tree_by_default"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag root packages that re-export many heavy submodules automatically."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
